title: Updated Elevated Authentication Process with OTP-Based Login and Password Option

assumptions.description: Users will receive OTPs through their registered email addresses or mobile numbers
Users will have a basic understanding of dog behavior and needs
Users will have a user-friendly interface to interact with the system
Users will have a stable internet connection to access the system

constraints.description: The system will not recommend dog breeds that are not suitable for the user's lifestyle and preferences
The system will not recommend dog breeds that are not available in the user's location
User sessions with invalid or expired OTPs will be terminated during login
User sessions with incorrect passwords will be terminated during login
The system will not store user OTPs for long-term use
The system will not store user passwords in plain text

out_of_scope.description: The system will not provide personalized advice on dog training and behavior modification
The system will not integrate with veterinary services or other pet-related businesses
The system will not provide user authentication through social media accounts

user_stories.user_story: As a busy professional, I want to log in to my account using OTP or password to quickly access my dog breed recommendations
As a family with young children, we want to log in to our account using OTP or password so that we can easily find dog breeds suitable for our family
As a runner, I want to log in to my account using OTP or password so that I can save time and quickly access dog breeds for active lifestyles
As a new user, I want to log in to my account using password to easily access the system and start using its features

functional_requirements.title: Modified User Authentication
functional_requirements.description: Verify user's OTP and credentials to log in to their accounts

functional_requirements.title: Login with Password
functional_requirements.description: Allow users to log in with their password option

functional_requirements.title: Modified OTP Verification for Login
functional_requirements.description: Verify user's OTP to log in to their accounts

functional_requirements.title: OTP-Based Login Validation
functional_requirements.description: Verify user's OTP during login to authenticate their accounts

functional_requirements.title: Login Failure Handling
functional_requirements.description: Handle user login failures due to incorrect passwords or other login issues

functional_requirements.title: Password Security
functional_requirements.description: Ensure that passwords are stored securely and meet password policy requirements

functional_requirements.title: New Password Login Validation
functional_requirements.description: Verify user's password during login to authenticate their accounts

functional_requirements.title: New Password Login with Error Handling
functional_requirements.description: Allow users to log in with their password option with error handling for incorrect passwords

functional_requirements.title: Confirm Password
functional_requirements.description: Verify user's password is the same as their confirmation during password update

functional_requirements.title: Forgot Password
functional_requirements.description: Allow users to reset their password when they forget it

functional_requirements.title: Login with Password (Modified)
functional_requirements.description: Allow users to log in with their password option

functional_requirements.title: Password Reset
functional_requirements.description: Allow users to reset their password when they forget it

functional_requirements.title: Password Security Enhancement
functional_requirements.description: Enhance password security by updating password policy to meet industry standards

non_functional_requirements.title: User Experience
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure a user-friendly interface with clear and concise language

non_functional_requirements.title: Data Security
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure that user data is collected and stored securely

non_functional_requirements.title: Scalability
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure that the system can handle a large volume of user requests and traffic

non_functional_requirements.title: Accessibility
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure that the system is accessible to users with disabilities

non_functional_requirements.title: Integration
non_functional_requirements.description: Integrate the system with external data sources, such as dog breed databases

non_functional_requirements.title: OTP Security
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure that OTPs are securely generated, verified, and stored

non_functional_requirements.title: Authentication Failure Handling
non_functional_requirements.description: Handle user authentication failures during login due to incorrect OTPs or expired OTPs

non_functional_requirements.title: Database Security
non_functional_requirements.description: Ensure that sensitive user data is stored securely in the database

non_functional_requirements.title: Password Policy
non_functional_requirements.description: Establish a password policy that meets industry standards
